title: Command fails with 'No such file': broken update-alternatives link
description_md:
Running `mytool` now fails with `No such file or directory`, even though the package is installed. It's managed by the `update-alternatives` system, and a partial upgrade left the alternative pointing at a version that isn't on disk. SSH in as `trainee` (passwordless `sudo`), repair the alternatives link so `mytool` runs again.

You're done when `mytool` executes successfully.
